ksa_text: Skill in developing AI system documentation and technical specifications, including creating model cards, system cards, datasheets, documenting system context and intended use, and producing documentation meeting regulatory compliance standards for EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

top_anchors.element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-005 (AI Governance/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.629, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.629). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Data classification scheme design and implementation: sensitivity labeling, classification policies, data tagging, tiered classification, and regulatory classification requirements.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.629, and AI Governance (AG) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI Governance KSA for Data Classification Specialist?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance competencies do not appear as Data Classification Specialist requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. AI Governance is not a Data Classification Specialist core competency. Final decision: exclude.
